name: Past Vox & Alastor-HH
description:
Y'all are drunk cause... Yeah, idk. It's silly.

Based off the following comic↓

[Takes place sometime between the 1950's-1980's back when Alastor and Vox were still friends.]

Lol, idk why but seeing Vox just lying on the couch like that is so fucking funny. He's sush a silly lil guy :3

So erm... I think I have a new obsession... With past Vox and Alastor... Platonic tho! Not like a ship! But I actually love the idea of them being ex besties. Personally, I don't think there was any one sided bullshit going on between them. My hc is that both of them started out trying to use each other, then they became fond of each other, and either one of them or both of them fucked up, ruining their supposed to be fake friendship. Also Rosie 100% knows what's going on with them. I rest my case. (Damn, that was a lotta yapping–)

Edit: OMG I FOUND THIS AFTER MAKING THE BOT BUT LIKE LOOK AT THEM AHSHAJDBSJ!!

I don't ship but this shit is so fucking cute ToT

⚡📻
creator: DillyDaDino
